vocab.meaning: cánh cửa nhìn về quá khứ (thứ giúp hiểu về lịch sử)
vocab.example: To me, a history museum is a fascinating window into the past, revealing how our ancestors lived.
The contemporary art exhibition provided plenty of food for thought regarding the impact of technology on society.

vocab.meaning: có bề dày lịch sử, đậm chất lịch sử
vocab.example: I prefer visiting museums that are steeped in history, as they have a very distinct, solemn atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: thấu hiểu hoặc nắm bắt được điều gì đó
vocab.example: Visiting an art gallery helps me get a handle on different artistic movements like Surrealism or Cubism.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó không thốt nên lời (vì quá ấn tượng)
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the statues in the British Museum left me completely speechless.

vocab.meaning: phần cộng thêm làm cho mọi thứ hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: The museum was great, but having a knowledgeable guide was the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: hồi phục năng lượng, thư giãn tâm trí
vocab.example: I find that spending a quiet afternoon in an art gallery is a perfect way to recharge my batteries.
I only visit art galleries once in a blue moon, but when I do, I truly appreciate the craftsmanship.

vocab.meaning: làm cho cái gì đó trở nên sống động
vocab.example: The interactive displays at the science museum really bring the laws of physics to life for visitors.

vocab.meaning: tuyệt vời, không tưởng (vượt xa mức bình thường)
vocab.example: The intricate details on the ancient jewelry at the exhibit were simply out of this world.
